title: onoclea scandens
intro: Onoclea scandens, also known as the climbing lady fern, is a species of fern native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Onoclea scandens include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as aiding in digestion and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Onoclea scandens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
